// THE PLATFORM

Everything Your Store Needs

Six fully integrated modules — each one powerful on its own, unstoppable together.

📋
Deal Desk

Build complete deal structures in minutes. Selling price, F&I products, trade equity, down payment, and monthly payments across any term — all calculating live as you type.

F&I BUILT-IN
🏦
Multi-Lender Engine

Run your deal through 11 lenders simultaneously. See eligibility, LTV, max advance, and approval likelihood ranked and ready. Submit right the first time, every time.

11 LENDERS
⚡
Compare All

One click shows every eligible lender side by side — rates, terms, payments, and dealer profit. The fastest deal comparison in the industry.

INSTANT RANKING
🤖
SARAH AI

Your AI sales assistant that texts leads automatically, handles replies intelligently, and books test drives 24/7. Every conversation tracked in a unified timeline. Never lose a lead to slow follow-up again.

AI-POWERED
🏪
Inventory

Sync your lot in one click. Every vehicle feeds the Deal Desk dropdown, the lender checker, and SARAH's lead matching automatically. Always current, always connected.

AUTO-SYNC
📊
Analytics

Track gross profit, F&I penetration, monthly volume, and sales pace against your target. Know your numbers cold — no exports, no spreadsheets, no guessing.

LIVE DASHBOARD
// WHY FIRST-FIN

Built Different. By Design.

Most dealer software is built for large franchise groups with IT departments and six-figure budgets. First Fin is built for independent dealers who need everything to just work.

🔗
Fully Integrated — No Tab Switching Deal Desk, lenders, AI follow-up, and inventory all talk to each other in real time. Build a deal, check lenders, and follow up on the lead — all in one platform.
🎯
Customizable for Your Store Your lender lineup, your rates, your team names, your deal defaults. First Fin configures to match your workflow — not the other way around.
🔒
Secure & Cloud-Hosted Bank-grade encryption, secure authentication, and enterprise cloud hosting. Access your platform from any device, anywhere — no local server, no IT headaches.
⚡
Up and Running in Under an Hour No installation, no training week, no onboarding consultant. Import your inventory, set your defaults, and you're live. Simple enough for a one-person operation.
